title: Incremental Programming Game
subtitle: Click Run program to earn score. Mini-tasks interrupt the loop after a few executed actions, and good answers unlock stronger programming tools.
controlsHintLocked: The editor unlocks after 2 correct mini-task answers.
controlsHintEditable: Edit your program here, then visit Shop to unlock more real Python tools.
challengeActiveMessage: Mini-task waiting. Solve it to continue.
allTasksCompletedMessage: All current prototype tasks are solved.
runPanelRunningMessage: Executing your program step by step...
editorLockedDescription: Programming unlocks after two correct mini-task answers. Until then, the game runs add_score() for you.
editorUnlockedDescription: You can now edit your program. Only add_score() is unlocked until you buy your first real Python loop.
programReadyMessage: Valid program. This click will execute {count} add_score() action(s).
programErrorEmpty: Your program is empty. Add at least one add_score().
programErrorTooManyLines: Too many non-empty lines. Current limit is {limit}.
programErrorInvalidLine: Line {line}: only add_score() is allowed right now.
programErrorUnsupportedForLoop: Line {line}: only for _ in range(N): is unlocked right now.
programErrorForRangeLimit: Line {line}: range() must stay between 1 and {max}.
programErrorForBodyRequired: Line {line}: add at least one indented add_score() under this for loop.
programErrorInvalidForBody: Line {line}: only indented add_score() lines are allowed inside this for loop.
programErrorNestedBlocks: Line {line}: nested blocks are not unlocked yet.
programErrorUnexpectedIndentation: Line {line}: this indented line needs a supported for loop above it.
programErrorStepLimitExceeded: This program would execute too many steps at once. The current limit is {max}.
runBlockedInvalidProgram: Fix the program to run it again.
feedGameOpened: Game opened. Your first goal is to start the loop.
feedRunHint: Click Run program until a mini-task interrupts you.
feedLineUnlocked: Unlocked a new program line. Capacity is now {lines}.
feedShopOpened: Opened the Shop. New real Python upgrades are now visible.
tutorialRunMessage: Click Run program a few times. That is how you earn score and eventually trigger your first mini-task.
tutorialChallengeMessage: Mini-tasks interrupt the loop on purpose. Solve the current one to keep progressing.
tutorialEditorMessage: You now have 2 lines. Try copying add_score() onto the second line, then open Shop to see the next real Python unlocks.
shopSubtitle: Unlock real Python syntax in course order.
shopAvailableHint: Earn more score to buy this upgrade.
availableStructuresEmpty: No Python structures are unlocked yet.
availableSyntaxNextEditor: Solve 2 mini-tasks to unlock the editor
availableSyntaxNextFor: Buy the for loop in Shop
availableSyntaxNextVariables: Variables come next in the skill tree
